habitat: Central Asia to SE Europe; cultivated widely.
traditionalUsesEn: Culinary nut rich in oils; traditional leaf external washes.
traditionalUsesDe: Speisenuss reich an Ölen; traditionelle äußerliche Blattwaschungen.
activeCompounds: Omega-3 ALA, polyphenols (ellagitannins), juglone in green parts
preparation: Shelled nuts as food; traditional leaf decoctions external.
cautions: Nut allergy. Green husk stains and can irritate. Food nuts generally safe.
habitatDe: Central Asien zu SE Europa; angebaut widely.
activeCompoundsDe: Omega-3 ALA, polyphenols (ellagitannins), juglone in green parts
preparationDe: Shelled nuts als Nahrung; traditionell Blatt Abkochungs äußerlich.
cautionsDe: Nut Allergie. Green husk stains und kann irritate. Food nuts im Allgemeinen unbedenklich.
